name: Serno
long_description:
Serno is the AI tool you reach for when one model isn't enough: pricing strategy, market entry, hiring trade-offs, anything you'd normally route to a team. Describe the question and Serno assembles 3–5 AI experts on Claude, GPT, and Gemini, each with a real role and research brief. 

They debate contradictions and map the answer as a canvas you can navigate, share, or export.
one_liner: Custom AI experts that map what one AI can't
